name: Cross-Chain Skill Purchase (LayerZero)
description: Buy a SKILLAI skill from any L2 / sidechain by bridging USDC to Ethereum L1 via LayerZero. Funds settle on L1, the credential mints on L1, the agent keeps operating on its home chain. Demonstrates the full cross-chain agent commerce loop.

steps.description: abi.encode(onBehalfOf, skillId, amount, paidInUsdc=true) — the SKILLAI CrossChainReceiver payload.
LayerZero relays the message + funds to L1. The CrossChainReceiver dispatches purchaseSkillCrossChain() on SkillMarketplace. Typical finality: 5-15 min.

rule.topic0_comment: Computed at deploy time from SkillMarketplace event signature
rule.comment: Validator scans recent SkillPurchased events on the SKILLAI marketplace and confirms one with agent = msg-payload sender (paidInUsdc=true) within 24h of the LayerZero send tx.
